summary: Frontend testing complete for Liquid Steel theme route migration. All 20 tests PASSED. The root '/' now correctly serves the Liquid Steel dark-themed homepage. All navigation links (Platform, Intelligence, Integrations, Pricing, Trust) work correctly and show themed pages. Old /site/* paths properly redirect to '/'. Login and Register pages have correct dark theme styling.

tests_executed.test_01_homepage_liquid_steel: PASS - Root '/' shows dark background rgb(15,23,32) = #0F1720, Cormorant Garamond H1, orange accents
tests_executed.test_02_platform_page: PASS - /platform loads with dark bg rgb(15,23,32)
tests_executed.test_03_intelligence_page: PASS - /intelligence loads with dark bg rgb(15,23,32)
tests_executed.test_04_integrations_page: PASS - /our-integrations loads with dark bg rgb(15,23,32)
tests_executed.test_05_pricing_page: PASS - /pricing loads with dark bg rgb(15,23,32)
tests_executed.test_06_trust_page: PASS - /trust loads with dark bg rgb(15,23,32)
tests_executed.test_07_trust_terms_page: PASS - /trust/terms loads with dark bg, white H1
tests_executed.test_08_login_page: PASS - /login-supabase shows dark theme, all form elements present
tests_executed.test_15_footer_links: PASS - All 12 footer links point to correct paths (no /site/ prefix)
tests_executed.test_16_nav_click_verification: PASS - Get Started and Log in nav buttons navigate correctly
tests_executed.test_17_trust_dropdown: PASS - Trust dropdown shows 5 items, clicking Terms navigates to /trust/terms
tests_executed.test_18_theme_consistency: PASS - All 13 pages have consistent dark theme rgb(15,23,32)
tests_executed.test_19_orange_accent: PASS - Hero CTA has orange gradient background rgb(255,106,0)
tests_executed.test_20_font_families: PASS - H1 uses 'Cormorant Garamond', body uses 'Inter'

verified_features: Root '/' serves Liquid Steel homepage with dark background #0F1720
Orange accent color #FF6A00 present on CTAs and stat numbers
Cormorant Garamond font for headings, Inter for body text
Navigation links work correctly: Platform, Intelligence, Integrations, Pricing, Trust
/login-supabase shows Liquid Steel themed login with dark background
Footer links all point to correct paths (no /site/ prefix)

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing skipped per request

context_for_next_testing_agent: Liquid Steel theme route migration complete and verified. All public-facing website pages now serve dark theme (#0F1720 background) from root paths. Old /site/* routes redirect to '/'. Login and register pages have correct themed styling. All navigation and footer links work correctly without /site/ prefix.
